scripts.check: for f in scripts/ck3-content-lint scripts/ck3-save-collections scripts/ck3-save-discover scripts/ck3-save-ingest scripts/ck3-save-references scripts/ck3-save-report scripts/ck3-save-schema scripts/ck3-save-schema-diff scripts/ck3-save-shape scripts/ck3-sources scripts/ck3-wiki-source scripts/test-candidate-collections scripts/test-content-lint scripts/test-identity-references scripts/test-mediawiki-source scripts/test-save-discover scripts/test-schema-diff scripts/test-schema-fixtures scripts/test-schema-graph scripts/test-shape-fingerprints scripts/test-source-registry scripts/lib/*.mjs; do node --check "$f"; done
scripts.check:all: npm run check && npm run lint:content && npm run test:fixtures && npm run test:mediawiki && npm run test:sources && npm run test:discover && npm run test:shapes && npm run test:collections && npm run test:references && npm run test:schema && npm run test:schema-diff
